topWPAPlays.description: Chase DeLauter doubles (6) on a line drive to right fielder Ryan Vilade. Kyle Manzardo to 3rd.
George Valera strikes out swinging.
Jonathan Aranda homers (7) on a fly ball to right field.
Daniel Schneemann strikes out swinging.
Daniel Schneemann homers (4) on a fly ball to left center field. David Fry scores.
JJ Wetherholt homers (6) on a fly ball to right center field.
José Fermín doubles (2) on a line drive to left fielder Jake Mangum. Victor Scott II scores. Alec Burleson scores. Jordan Walker to 3rd.
Jordan Walker walks. Victor Scott II to 3rd. Alec Burleson to 2nd.
Masyn Winn grounds into a double play, second baseman Brandon Lowe to shortstop Konnor Griffin to first baseman Spencer Horwitz. José Fermín out at 2nd. Masyn Winn out at 1st.
Ryan O'Hearn singles on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jordan Walker. Brandon Lowe scores.
Marcelo Mayer singles on a sharp line drive to center fielder Myles Straw. Willson Contreras scores. Wilyer Abreu to 3rd.
Roman Anthony singles on a soft ground ball to first baseman Vladimir Guerrero Jr. Jarren Duran scores. Willson Contreras to 3rd.
Wilyer Abreu doubles (6) on a sharp line drive to right fielder Jesús Sánchez. Willson Contreras scores. Roman Anthony to 3rd.
Tyler Heineman grounds into a double play, shortstop Trevor Story to second baseman Marcelo Mayer to first baseman Willson Contreras. Davis Schneider out at 2nd. Tyler Heineman out at 1st.
Trevor Story pops out to catcher Tyler Heineman in foul territory.
Kody Clemens homers (3) on a fly ball to right field. Josh Bell scores. Ryan Jeffers scores.

Twins challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: Twins challenged (home-plate collision), call on the field was upheld: Luke Keaschall doubles (4) on a line drive to right fielder Rob Refsnyder. Josh Bell scores.

Byron Buxton pops out to shortstop J.P. Crawford.
Ryan Jeffers singles on a line drive to right fielder Rob Refsnyder. Trevor Larnach scores. Josh Bell to 2nd.
Andrew Benintendi doubles (5) on a line drive to right fielder Jo Adell. Chase Meidroth scores. Tristan Peters scores. Edgar Quero to 3rd.

Adam Frazier grounds out, second baseman Chase Meidroth to first baseman Munetaka Murakami.

Ben Rice homers (10) on a fly ball to center field. Trent Grisham scores.
Ezequiel Duran grounds into a force out, shortstop José Caballero to second baseman Jazz Chisholm Jr. Alejandro Osuna out at 2nd.
Aaron Judge homers (11) on a line drive to left field.

Moisés Ballesteros hits a grand slam (5) to right field. Alex Bregman scores. Ian Happ scores. Seiya Suzuki scores.

Ty France hits a ground-rule double (2) on a fly ball to left-center field. Jackson Merrill scores. Manny Machado scores. Miguel Andujar to 3rd.
Freddy Fermin challenged (pitch result), call on the field was overturned: Michael Busch called out on strikes.

Will Smith strikes out on a foul tip.
Teoscar Hernández singles on a ground ball to center fielder Jakob Marsee. Shohei Ohtani scores. Freddie Freeman scores.
